Neighborhood Fixers

Neighborhood Fixers is a technician-led collective covering HVAC, electrical, and small remodeling jobs for bungalows and duplexes. Clients book through text or WhatsApp, get photo confirmations, and can tip or subscr…

Built for neighborhood services

📍 Local-first layout

Show service areas, hours, and Google-friendly copy blocks.

📅 Booking friendly

Highlight phone, booking links, or walk-in details with dedicated CTAs.

🧾 Service menus

Prebuilt patterns for pricing tables, testimonials, and FAQs.

🤝 Trust-building sections

Drop in reviews, certifications, and community highlights.
